verses.text: The rite of consecration begins with a bullock and two rams. Set apart. Priests are made holy by sacrifice.
The rite of consecration begins with a bullock and two rams. Set apart. Priests are made holy by sacrifice.
The rite of consecration begins with a bullock and two rams. Set apart. Priests are made holy by sacrifice.
Aaron is washed, robed, and anointed with the oil. Anointed. The priest is cleansed and consecrated.
Aaron is washed, robed, and anointed with the oil. Anointed. The priest is cleansed and consecrated.
Aaron is washed, robed, and anointed with the oil. Anointed. The priest is cleansed and consecrated.
Aaron is washed, robed, and anointed with the oil. Anointed. The priest is cleansed and consecrated.
His sons are clothed; the priesthood is theirs by perpetual statute. The line. The office passes to his house.
His sons are clothed; the priesthood is theirs by perpetual statute. The line. The office passes to his house.
The bullock is offered as a sin offering for the priests. Sin offering. Sin must be dealt with first.
The bullock is offered as a sin offering for the priests. Sin offering. Sin must be dealt with first.
The bullock is offered as a sin offering for the priests. Sin offering. Sin must be dealt with first.
The bullock is offered as a sin offering for the priests. Sin offering. Sin must be dealt with first.
The bullock is offered as a sin offering for the priests. Sin offering. Sin must be dealt with first.
A ram is offered as a burnt offering, a sweet savour to God. Burnt offering. Full devotion ascends to Him.
A ram is offered as a burnt offering, a sweet savour to God. Burnt offering. Full devotion ascends to Him.
A ram is offered as a burnt offering, a sweet savour to God. Burnt offering. Full devotion ascends to Him.
A ram is offered as a burnt offering, a sweet savour to God. Burnt offering. Full devotion ascends to Him.
The second ram's blood is put on the priests' ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God's service.
The second ram's blood is put on the priests' ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God's service.
The second ram's blood is put on the priests' ear, hand, and toe. Marked. The whole man is set to God's service.
Parts are waved before the LORD and burnt on the altar. Wave offering. The gift is presented to God.
Parts are waved before the LORD and burnt on the altar. Wave offering. The gift is presented to God.
Parts are waved before the LORD and burnt on the altar. Wave offering. The gift is presented to God.
Parts are waved before the LORD and burnt on the altar. Wave offering. The gift is presented to God.
The breast and shoulder become the priests' portion. Their portion. Those who serve the altar live by it.
The breast and shoulder become the priests' portion. Their portion. Those who serve the altar live by it.
The breast and shoulder become the priests' portion. Their portion. Those who serve the altar live by it.
Aaron's holy garments pass to his sons after him. Succession. The holy office endures.
Aaron's holy garments pass to his sons after him. Succession. The holy office endures.
The flesh is eaten in the holy place; none is left till morning. Holy meal. The consecrated feed on the offering.
The flesh is eaten in the holy place; none is left till morning. Holy meal. The consecrated feed on the offering.
The flesh is eaten in the holy place; none is left till morning. Holy meal. The consecrated feed on the offering.
The flesh is eaten in the holy place; none is left till morning. Holy meal. The consecrated feed on the offering.
Seven days consecrate them; the altar becomes most holy. Seven days. Full consecration takes its time.
Seven days consecrate them; the altar becomes most holy. Seven days. Full consecration takes its time.
Seven days consecrate them; the altar becomes most holy. Seven days. Full consecration takes its time.
Two lambs are offered daily, morning and evening, continually. Daily offering. Worship is unceasing.
Two lambs are offered daily, morning and evening, continually. Daily offering. Worship is unceasing.
Two lambs are offered daily, morning and evening, continually. Daily offering. Worship is unceasing.
Two lambs are offered daily, morning and evening, continually. Daily offering. Worship is unceasing.
There God will meet and dwell with Israel: 'I am the LORD their God.' God dwells. The aim of all is His presence among them.
There God will meet and dwell with Israel: 'I am the LORD their God.' God dwells. The aim of all is His presence among them.
